caption: A young man with glasses and a black t-shirt stands in front of a whiteboard, addressing an audience. He wears a lanyard with an ID badge around his neck. His body language suggests he is engaged in a presentation or lecture, as he gestures slightly with his hands while speaking. The setting appears to be a classroom or conference room, indicated by the presence of the whiteboard and a chair in the foreground. The man maintains a steady posture, indicating confidence and focus on delivering his message.
